results.title: Pfizer (PFE) Analyst Rating Update: Target Price Lowered to $26

summary: Upgrades: Argus Research raised PT to $35 (Mar 2, upgrade to Buy); Guggenheim maintained Buy, raised PT $35->$36 (Mar 24); HSBC maintained Buy, raised PT $29->$32 (Mar 17). Downgrades: RBC Capital initiated Underperform PT $25 (Feb 25); Barclays initiated Underweight PT $25 (Feb 20); Goldman Sachs cut PT to $26 ahead of Q1 2026 earnings. Consensus from 31 brokers: 2.6/5 (Hold). 10 Buy, 15 Hold, 3 Sell out of 35 analysts.
